h1.visual_description: Not present as a standard header on this page, but appears in the footer as all-caps, bold sans-serif text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Equation numbering for centered mathematical expressions.
Caption label for figures or tables, placed immediately below the visual element.
Page footer containing the experiment title and the page number in the bottom right corner.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (use $$ for display equations and $ for inline variables like Re, v, d, ν)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Not explicitly shown, but likely numeric or author-date based on scientific context.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right footer text containing experiment metadata and page numbers.
